meta.description: Smell index for TypeScript. Maps to rubric.json rule_ref.

smells.name: any escape hatch
smells.summary: any used where unknown plus narrowing would be safer.

smells.name: Unjustified non-null assertion
smells.summary: The ! operator used on values that can be null at runtime.

smells.name: Structural cast without validation
smells.summary: as T applied to untrusted input (JSON, form data, env).

smells.name: Dead generic parameter
smells.summary: Type parameter declared but not tied to arguments or return.

smells.name: Numeric enum for string set
smells.summary: enum with integer values used where a string union would be clearer.

smells.name: Unvalidated API response
smells.summary: fetch().json() typed by cast instead of runtime schema.

smells.name: Floating promise
smells.summary: async call without await, return, or handler.

smells.name: Opaque object type
smells.summary: object/Object used instead of a named shape or Record.

smells.name: Positive: type guard
smells.summary: Narrowing expressed via `x is T` predicate.

smells.name: Conditional type soup
smells.summary: Nested conditional types for trivial mappings.

smells.name: Missing import type
smells.summary: Value import used only in type positions.
